series_metadata.series_description: Hiring materials and job bid files for Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) positions. May contain vacancy postings, personnel requisitions, position description, applications (Hard copy and electronic), resumes, test questions, and related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 6 months after decision is made to fill or not to fill a position, transfer to records center for 7 years, then destroy provided there is no legal action pending. ; Electronic: Retain in office 6 months after decision is made to fill or not to fill a position, transfer to records center for 7 years, then destroy provided there is no legal action pending., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
